heroTitle: I build modern and well-designed Android apps.
heroDesc: I'm an Android Developer focused on creating robust applications with clean architecture, excellent user experience, and sustainable product evolution. This portfolio showcases projects, technical skills, and my approach to modern mobile development.
aboutSubtitle: A clear, professional presentation focused on technical impact.
profileDesc: Android Developer with experience building applications in Kotlin, using Jetpack Compose and organizing code with Clean Architecture principles. I enjoy creating stable, readable solutions prepared to grow with the product.
valuesDesc: I value well-structured code, careful interfaces, good separation of responsibilities, and continuous learning. I'm also interested in exploring AI integration in mobile applications and evolving towards more complete solutions across app, backend, and web.
projectsSubtitle: You can replace titles, descriptions, and links when you have your final project selection.
project1Desc: Health and user tracking project, designed to combine modern Android, good architecture, and future evolution with intelligent features.
project2Desc: Space reserved for an application with API integration, local persistence, and focus on user experience and layered organization.
project3Desc: Space reserved for a project showcasing architecture, component reuse, and ability to develop features sustainably.
stackSubtitle: Core skills you can adjust, remove, or expand based on your current focus.
contactSubtitle: I've already prepared the structure for you to fill in the links later.
contactSectionDesc: You can use this section to add your professional email, GitHub, LinkedIn, and other relevant links. The idea is to keep everything simple, direct, and easy to update.
